title: erigeron antonius
intro: Erigeron antonius, also known as Rosy Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron antonius include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Erigeron antonius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
